collectible.name: Soviet SSH-40 Helmet
collectible.description:
Soviet SSH-40 steel helmet from World War II, the standard issue helmet for Red Army forces during the Great Patriotic War. This example was manufactured in 1942 during the height of the conflict.
The SSH-40 was an improvement over the earlier SSH-39, featuring a simplified production process while maintaining excellent protection. The distinctive shape with its wide brim provided good coverage.
This helmet retains its original khaki green paint with visible wear from field use. The three-pad liner system and chinstrap are intact. Factory markings stamped inside indicate Leningrad production.
